selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: a. 有色的, 有...色的, 经过渲染的, 有色彩的, 伪装的, 有色人种的, 混血种的；n. 有色人种的人, 混血人
n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 王冠, 王权, 顶点；vt. 使成王, 加冕, 居...之顶
words.definition: n. the Crown (or the reigning monarch) as the symbol of the power and authority of a monarchy

words.translation: n. 大纲, 轮廓, 概要；vt. 描画轮廓, 描述要点
words.definition: n. the line that appears to bound an object

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: a. 很多的, 数目众多的, 多数的；[机] 多数的, 甚多的
words.definition: s. amounting to a large indefinite number

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 正方形, 街区, 广场, 平方, 直角尺；a. 正方形的, 正直的, 公正的, 平方的, 方正的, 结清的
words.definition: n. (geometry) a plane rectangle with four equal sides and four right angles; a four-sided regular polygon

words.translation: n. 艺术, 人文科学, 技术, 巧妙, 诡计, 美术
words.definition: n. the products of human creativity; works of art collectively

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 颜色, 面色, 颜料, 外貌；vt. 把...涂上颜色, 粉饰, 使脸红, 歪曲
n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: prep. 自...以后, 自...以来；adv. 自那时以后
words.definition: adv. From a definite past time until now; as, he went a month

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: conj. 是否, 不论；pron. 两个中的哪一个
words.definition: pron. Which (of two); which one (of two); -- used

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子
words.definition: n. headdress that protects the head from bad weather; has shaped crown and usually a brim

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地
words.definition: a. characterized by or producing sound of great volume or intensity

words.translation: n. 收集, 采集, (一批)收藏品, 募捐
words.definition: n. several things grouped together or considered as a whole

words.translation: n. 鼠, 卑鄙的人, 破坏者, 变节者；vi. 捕鼠, 变节
words.definition: n. any of various long-tailed rodents similar to but larger than a mouse

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: a. 平坦的, 单调的, 无力的, 浅的, 萧条的, 干脆的, 无聊的；adv. 平直地, 断然地
n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 油漆, 颜料, 绘画作品, 涂漆；vt. 油漆, 绘, 画, 描绘, 装饰, 点缀
words.definition: n. a substance used as a coating to protect or decorate a surface (especially a mixture of pigment suspended in a liquid); dries to form a hard coating

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列
words.definition: n. the physical magnitude of something (how big it is)

words.translation: a. 可怕的, 令人恐惧的, 极坏的
n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸；vt. 装门于
words.definition: n. a movable barrier in a fence or wall

words.translation: n. 门厅, 走廊, 会堂
words.definition: n. a large room for gatherings or entertainment

words.translation: a. 健康的, 有益健康的, 卫生的
words.definition: a. having or indicating good health in body or mind; free from infirmity or disease

words.translation: n. 敲, 敲打, 敲门；v. 敲击, 互撞, 攻击
words.definition: n. the sound of knocking (as on a door or in an engine or bearing)

words.translation: a. 疯狂的, 发疯的, 生气的, 愚蠢的, 狂欢的；n. 狂怒
v. 祈祷, 恳求, 请
words.definition: v. address a deity, a prophet, a saint or an object of worship; say a prayer

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱
words.definition: n. the words of something written

words.translation: num. 八, 八个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of seven and one

words.translation: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
words.definition: r. in truth (often tends to intensify)

words.translation: n. 画, 绘画, 油漆
words.definition: n. graphic art consisting of an artistic composition made by applying paints to a surface

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: adv. 简单地, 只是, 简直, 简朴地, 坦白地
words.definition: r. absolutely; altogether; really

words.translation: adv. 如此, 因此, 到如此程度
words.definition: r. in the way indicated; (`thusly' is a nonstandard variant)

words.translation: n. 布料, 织品, 布；[建] 布
n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字标, 交叉路, 磨难, 杂交；a. 生气的, 交叉的, 相反的
words.definition: n. a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece

words.translation: n. 种类, 性质, 方式；a. 亲切的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的
words.definition: n. a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: a. 吸引人的, 有魅力的
words.definition: a. pleasing to the eye or mind especially through beauty or charm

words.translation: n. 啤酒
words.definition: n. a general name for alcoholic beverages made by fermenting a cereal (or mixture of cereals) flavored with hops

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的
n. 幽默, 诙谐, 情绪, 体液；vt. 使满足, 迁就
n. 旋转, 自旋, 疾驰, 情绪低落；vt. 纺织, 纺, 使旋转, 编造
words.definition: n. a swift whirling motion (usually of a missile)

words.translation: interj. 嗨
words.definition: a. High.

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 鸭子；vi. 没入水中, 闪避
words.definition: n. small wild or domesticated web-footed broad-billed swimming bird usually having a depressed body and short legs

words.translation: n. 歌剧
words.definition: n. a drama set to music; consists of singing with orchestral accompaniment and an orchestral overture and interludes

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: n. 玫瑰, 蔷薇, 玫瑰色；a. 玫瑰色的, 玫瑰花的
words.definition: n. any of many shrubs of the genus Rosa that bear roses

words.translation: n. 目录, 大学情况一览；vt. 编入目录
n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人；vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃
words.definition: n. a small worthless amount

words.translation: n. 制造, (手工)制造业, 制作, 形成, 发展, 要素, 内在因素, 赚头, 制造物
words.definition: n. (usually plural) the components needed for making or doing something

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: 有限的
build的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. (used of soaps or cleaning agents) having a substance (an abrasive or filler) added to increase effectiveness

words.translation: a. 有资格的；给与名称的
words.definition: s. qualified for by right according to law

words.translation: n. 埃文斯（姓氏）
words.definition: n. United States anatomist who identified four pituitary hormones and discovered vitamin E (1882-1971)

words.translation: n. 盥洗室, 厕所, 嫖客
words.definition: n. youngest son of Henry II; King of England from 1199 to 1216; succeeded to the throne on the death of his brother Richard I; lost his French possessions; in 1

words.translation: n. 玛丽（女子名）
words.definition: n. the mother of Jesus; Christians refer to her as the Virgin Mary; she is especially honored by Roman Catholics

words.translation: n. 约克郡；约克王朝
words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose
